basic_details.job_title: CSIR NEERI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 – Walk in
basic_details.short_information: CSIR-NEERI Chennai Project Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced! CSIR-National Environmental Engineering Research Institute invites applications for Project Associate-I positions under the project “Development of Low-Strontium Salts-based Fireworks: A Promising Approach to Minimize Critical Mineral Use in the Firework Industries”. Walk-in-interview on 24 July 2026 at Chennai Regional Centre.Find all details about CSIR-NEERI Chennai Project Staff new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, emoluments, job requirement, and walk-in details here.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | job requirement: Emission testing of firecrackers, Data analysis & documentation, R&D formulation of Green Cracker and its characterization | emoluments (net/gate qualified): ₹31,000/- + HRA | emoluments (others): ₹25,000/- + HRA | age limit: 35 years (as on last date of receipt of applications)
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Chemistry (General/Organic/Inorganic/Analytical/Physical), Nano Tech., Polymer Science, Material Science from a recognized University/Institute

how_to_apply: Candidates shall appear for Walk-in-Interview at CSIR-NEERI, CSIR Madras Complex, Taramani, Chennai - 600 113 on 24 July 2026.
Original + one set photocopy of 10th, 12th, Graduate/Postgraduate mark sheets & Degree
important_instructions: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No application fee required. Upper age limit reckoned as on the last date. Only candidates with provisional/final certificate of essential qualification are eligible. The engagement does not confer any right for regularization in CSIR-NEERI.

rows.csir_national_environmental_engineering_: Development of Low-Strontium Salts-based Fireworks: A Promising Approach to Minimize Critical Mineral Use in the Firework Industries (FTT-030613)

rows.details: M.Sc. in Chemistry (General/Organic/Inorganic/Analytical/Physical), Nano Tech., Polymer Science, Material Science from a recognized University/Institute
Emission testing of firecrackers, Data analysis & documentation, R&D formulation of Green Cracker and its characterization
35 years (as on last date of receipt of applications)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CSIR-NEERI Chennai Project Staff 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates shall appear for Walk-in-Interview at CSIR-NEERI, CSIR Madras Complex, Taramani, Chennai - 600 113 on 24 July 2026. Documents to Bring: Passport size photograph Aadhaar card Original + one set photocopy of 10th, 12th, Graduate/Postgraduate mark sheets & Degree Filled application form

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No application fee required. Upper age limit reckoned as on the last date. Only candidates with provisional/final certificate of essential qualification are eligible. The engagement does not confer any right for regularization in CSIR-NEERI.

faq.question: Q1. What is the walk-in-interview date for CSIR-NEERI Chennai 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in-interview is on 24 July 2026 from 9:30 AM to 11:00 AM.

faq.question: Q2. How many Project Associate-I positions are available at CSIR-NEERI Chennai?
faq.answer: 02 positions (anticipated up to 03 depending on funds).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at CSIR-NEERI?
faq.answer: ₹31,000 + HRA for NET/GATE qualified candidates or ₹25,000 + HRA for others.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for CSIR-NEERI Fireworks Project?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Chemistry or related fields like Nano Tech, Polymer Science, or Material Science.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for CSIR-NEERI Chennai Green Cracker Project?
faq.answer: Appear for Walk-in-Interview at CSIR Madras Complex, Taramani, Chennai with all original documents.

faq.question: Q6. What is the upper age limit for Project Associate at CSIR-NEERI Chennai?
faq.answer: 35 years as on the last date of receipt of applications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the project title for CSIR-NEERI Chennai recruitment?
faq.answer: Development of Low-Strontium Salts-based Fireworks: A Promising Approach to Minimize Critical Mineral Use in the Firework Industries.

faq.question: Q8. Is NET/GATE qualification mandatory for higher pay at CSIR-NEERI?
faq.answer: Yes, for ₹31,000 + HRA. Non-qualified candidates get ₹25,000 + HRA.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of appointment in CSIR-NEERI Chennai?
faq.answer: Purely temporary and co-terminus with the project duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for CSIR-NEERI walk-in-interview?
faq.answer: CSIR-NEERI, CSIR Madras Complex, Taramani, Chennai - 600 113.
